body: ## Purpose Closes #287 ## Content - more consistent plotting between tests - adjustments to the test problems - removed inappropriate Localization tests in `EnsembleKalmanProcess/runtests.jl` examples, (they are already properly tested in `Localizers/runtests.jl` ) - These caused blow up without disturbing the ensemble mean, therefore added some spread-checking too to ensure the tr(ensemble cov) does not increase too much - test UKI with nonlinear problems, not just linear ones - Added prior Tikhonov regularization for UKI, modified test checks to account for the regularization. - Changed the default `update_freq` in UKI from 1 to 0. I.e. uses prior cov not current cov by default. - Minor type change in UKI constructor to allow arrays to be converted to float type internally - added note to docs RE this update ---- - [ ] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist. ## UPDATED Example: To reproduce run `julia --project; ENV["CES_TEST_PLOT_OUTPUT"] = true; ]; test` and look for the figures `XYZ_test_4.png` in the runtest directory. Problem: `x in R^2`, and `y = (||x-x*||_1,||x-x*||_2, ||x-x*||_infty ) + N(0,0.01)`, 100 iterations of methods: Prior bounded by `[-2,2]` in x axis ### EKI & EKS ### Tikhonov UKI quad & simplex
title: Resolving some test problem consistency and apparent UKI instability
